context: You are visiting a doctor at a clinic in Beijing. You are not feeling well and need to describe your symptoms.

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say you have a headache and a fever

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: 知道了。还有其他症状吗？咳嗽、流鼻涕？
exchanges.translation: I see. Any other symptoms? Cough, runny nose?

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say yes, you also have a cough

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: 我给你开点药。每天三次，饭后服用。
exchanges.translation: I will prescribe some medicine. Three times a day, take it after meals.

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Ask if you need to come back

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: 需要，一个星期后再来。如果情况加重，马上打电话。
exchanges.translation: Yes, come back in a week. If it gets worse, call immediately.
